The European Reputation Network for Transport & Logistics

Independent ratings and reviews based on real business experience.

EU

Why CarrierTrust

Built for B2B Logistics

Neutral hosting platform

CarrierTrust hosts user-generated reviews and applies traceable moderation for legal and policy breaches.

Business-first

Reviews focus on real business experience. Companies can claim their profile and respond publicly.

EU-focused trust layer

Designed for cross-border transport where reputation, compliance and dispute traceability matter.

Process

How it works

A simple flow designed for real B2B logistics relationships.

01

Search & verify

Find a company by name or VAT. Verified profiles reduce identity ambiguity.

02

Publish real experience

Structured reviews focused on facts, outcomes, and cooperation quality.

03

Traceable moderation

Clear rules and audit-ready actions for disputes, edits, and removals.

Features

Trust signals that matter

Built for cross-border operations — not generic consumer reviews.

Verified identity

Company verification and profile ownership reduce fake listings and impersonation.

Moderation trace

Moderation actions are recorded. Clear policy and predictable enforcement.

Dispute readiness

Designed to support dispute workflows without turning into a court.

Claim & manage profile
Own your presence, add details, and respond to reviews publicly.
Verified badge
Signal trust and reduce friction with partners in Europe.
Business

For companies

Tools to protect reputation, respond professionally, and stay transparent.

Get StartedCompanies Directory

FAQ

Reviews are designed for real business relationships. We focus on traceable moderation and policy compliance.

We remove content that violates policy or law — not content that is simply negative.

Yes — the platform is built EU-first and focuses on cross-border transport & logistics.

Build trust before the next load.

Search a company or publish a real business review — in minutes.
